---
agent: playwright-test-planner
description: Create test plan for CRUD operations
---

Create a comprehensive test plan for the "Item CRUD operations" functionality of my Project Dashboard app.

The app supports:
- Viewing a list of items (title, description, status)
- Adding new items via a modal form
- Editing existing items via the same modal
- Deleting items with a confirmation dialog
- Items have title (required), description, and status (active/inactive)

- Seed file: `seed.spec.ts`
- Test plan: `specs/crud-operations.md`
